current_objective: Fix Lucky5.Infrastructure compile errors during dotnet publish for Lucky5.Api
decisions: Aligned InMemoryDataStoreAdapter with actual InMemoryDataStore collection types.
Updated GameServiceSimple shim to instantiate GameService with IDataStore adapter.
Added missing System.Net import for DnsEndPoint pattern matching.
Removed duplicate machine variable declaration in AdminService.ResetMachineAsync.
open_questions: Run full dotnet publish/test in environment with .NET SDK installed.
next_steps: Execute dotnet publish and Lucky5.Tests in CI or local SDK environment.
